holdings.infoBox: BBIN is an equity ETF with a total of 647 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.30%, HSBC Holdings at 1.51%, Novartis AG at 1.40%, AstraZeneca at 1.38%, and Roche Holding AG at 1.35%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan BetaBuilders International Equity ETF (BBIN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a developed countries ex-North America index of large- and mid-cap equities that are selected and weighted by market cap. BBIN was launched on Dec 5, 2019 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
infoTable: Morningstar Developed Markets ex-North America Target Market Exposure Index
